title: Primary (Idiopathic) Membranous Nephropathy
buzzwords: Middle-aged man with bilateral leg swelling
Renal vein thrombosis from antithrombin loss
Diffuse glomerular basement membrane thickening on light microscopy
Granular subepithelial IgG and C3 with silver-stain spikes

title: Secondary Membranous Nephropathy
buzzwords: Nephrotic syndrome with an identifiable trigger
Resolves after stopping offending NSAID, gold, or penicillamine
Solid-tumor malignancy: prostate, lung, breast, GI, bladder
Hepatitis B (also HCV, syphilis) chronic infection
Subepithelial AND mesangial immune deposits on EM
SLE class V lupus nephritis pattern
